title: Cat Coloring Book for Kids
subtitle: Fun, Easy and Relaxing Coloring Pages for Ages 4-8 Years

prompts.front: Professional kids coloring book cover, title 'Cat Coloring Book for Kids', cute cartoon cat characters, bright vivid colors, bold typography, clean layout, white background, Amazon KDP style, bestseller design, target age 4-8 Years, high quality illustration, no text overlap, centered composition
prompts.back: Back cover of kids coloring book, simple design, white background, small cute cat illustration, space for book description, barcode placeholder at bottom right, Amazon KDP back cover style
prompts.spine: Book spine design, title 'Cat Coloring Book for Kids', vertical text, colorful background, Amazon KDP spine style
prompts.negative: no blurry images, no watermark, no adult content, no dark themes, no violence, no scary elements, no copyright characters, no text errors
